sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 19

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 19:1
items.html: (to the question) All the discernments of Achoraim [posterior] of the Reshimot [records] whose time of correction has not yet come lie in the place of the Nukva of Atzilut, on account of their still being in the discernment of refuse in all the upper Partzufim. And although the Nukva too cannot yet clarify them, nevertheless it is impossible for the Reshimot to fall into BYA [Beria, Yetzira, Assiya], since they are correcting Lights, and they themselves, for their own needs, require no correction; all their said correction is only for the sake of the Kelim [vessels] and the sparks. Therefore the beginning of the raising of MAN [Mayin Nukvin] from the Reshimot is through the Nukva, as written in Answer 121. (p. 734, beginning "And with")
